T0054.title: Company Incubation
T0054.definition: A fraudulent scheme in which criminals create or manipulate shell companies to illegally obtain business loans or other financial gains. The companies are fabricated with falsified financial reports to apply for bank loans; once the funds are disbursed, they are immediately transferred and concealed to avoid detection or used for illicit purposes, such as tax-invoice loan fraud.
